tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: Review the provided retinal fundus photograph and determine whether any abnormalities are present.

dialogs.thought: Check for any embedded labels/markers that might indicate laterality or pathology annotations.
Get an overall description of the fundus image to orient to disc/macula and look for gross abnormalities.

content.content: Color retinal fundus photograph showing the optic disc on the left side with radiating retinal vessels; background retina appears tessellated with no obvious hemorrhages, exudates, or large lesions.

arguments.attribute: optic disc appearance and peripapillary region

dialogs.thought: Verify optic disc and peripapillary area for cupping, edema, hemorrhage, or myopic changes.

content.content: Optic disc is well-demarcated without swelling; vessels emerge normally. Peripapillary region shows mild atrophic/tessellated appearance consistent with myopic fundus; no disc hemorrhage seen.

dialogs.content: In this image, there are no apparent abnormalities. It represents a normal or fundus of high myopia.

whitelist: In this image, there are no apparent abnormalities. It represents a normal or fundus of high myopia.
